all.en: We propose a six month partnership with three carefully selected lifestyle influencers.
all.zh: 我們提案與三位精選的生活風格網紅進行為期六個月的合作。

all.en: The campaign aims to introduce our skincare line to a younger audience segment.
all.zh: 本活動旨在向更年輕的受眾族群介紹我們的保養品系列。

all.en: Our primary partner will be a creator with one point two million followers.
all.zh: 我們的主要合作對象將是一位擁有一百二十萬粉絲的創作者。

all.en: Her audience demographic aligns closely with our ideal customer profile.
all.zh: 她的受眾組成與我們的理想顧客輪廓高度吻合。

all.en: Two supporting partners each command audiences between one hundred and two hundred thousand.
all.zh: 兩位輔助合作夥伴各擁有十萬至二十萬之間的受眾。

all.en: Together these creators reach an estimated combined audience of two million.
all.zh: 這些創作者合計觸及估計兩百萬的受眾。

all.en: Each partner will produce four pieces of content over the campaign period.
all.zh: 每位合作夥伴將於活動期間產出四件內容作品。

all.en: Deliverables include reels, stories, and one long form tutorial each.
all.zh: 交付內容包含短影音、限時動態與各一支長版教學。

all.en: All content must feature our hero product used in authentic daily routines.
all.zh: 所有內容必須呈現我們的主打產品融入真實日常使用情境。

all.en: Creators retain creative freedom within our agreed brand guidelines.
all.zh: 創作者在雙方同意的品牌指南內保有創作自由。

all.en: Mandatory disclosure of the paid partnership will follow platform regulations.
all.zh: 付費合作的強制揭露將遵循平台規範。

all.en: Total proposed budget for the program is one hundred twenty thousand dollars.
all.zh: 本方案總提案預算為十二萬美元。

all.en: This sum covers talent fees, product samples, and a small amplification spend.
all.zh: 此金額涵蓋人才費用、產品樣品及小額擴散投放支出。

all.en: Each creator will also receive a unique discount code for tracking sales.
all.zh: 每位創作者也將獲得專屬折扣碼以追蹤銷售。

all.en: Key performance indicators include reach, saves, and code redemptions.
all.zh: 關鍵績效指標包含觸及人數、收藏數與折扣碼兌換數。

all.en: We target a minimum return on ad spend of three times the investment.
all.zh: 我們目標達到至少三倍投資的廣告投入報酬率。

all.en: Brand sentiment will be tracked through monthly social listening reports.
all.zh: 品牌情感將透過每月社群聆聽報告進行追蹤。

all.en: Performance reviews are scheduled at the end of months two and four.
all.zh: 成效檢視排定於第二個月與第四個月月底進行。

all.en: Contracts include exclusivity within the skincare category for the duration.
all.zh: 合約包含合作期間內保養品類別的排他條款。

all.en: Usage rights allow us to repurpose top performing content as paid ads.
all.zh: 使用權允許我們將表現頂尖的內容重新運用為付費廣告。

all.en: All contracts and creative briefs will be finalized by the end of next month.
all.zh: 所有合約與創意簡報將於下個月底前完成定稿。

all.en: The campaign is scheduled to launch in alignment with our spring product refresh.
all.zh: 本活動排定配合我們的春季產品更新同步啟動。

all.en: Please review the attached deck for full creator profiles and timelines.
all.zh: 請審閱隨附簡報以了解完整創作者輪廓與時程。

all.en: We welcome your questions and look forward to your approval to proceed.
all.zh: 歡迎您提出問題，期待您核准後續推進。

all.en: Our agency has already secured tentative holds on all three creators calendars.
all.zh: 我們的代理商已先行為三位創作者預留行事曆暫定檔期。

all.en: Final talent confirmation requires your written approval within ten business days.
all.zh: 正式人選確認需於十個工作日內取得您的書面核准。

all.en: We will set up an internal kickoff call once the contracts are signed.
all.zh: 合約簽署後，我們將安排一場內部啟動電話會議。

all.en: Product samples can be shipped to the creators studios by next Friday.
all.zh: 產品樣品可於下週五前寄送至各創作者的工作室。

all.en: Legal has cleared all proposed contract terms and required disclosure language.
all.zh: 法務已審結所有提案合約條款與必要揭露用語。

all.en: Crisis response protocols are documented in case of any reputational issues.
all.zh: 若發生任何聲譽風險，已備有危機應變流程文件。

all.en: Monthly reporting will be delivered through our shared partnership dashboard.
all.zh: 月度報告將透過我們的共用合作儀表板交付。

all.en: We recommend reserving budget for a possible extension into the autumn season.
all.zh: 我們建議保留預算以利可能延伸至秋季的合作。

all.en: Lessons learned will inform our influencer playbook for the coming fiscal year.
all.zh: 所獲心得將用於更新下一財年的網紅合作手冊。

all.en: Thank you for considering this proposal and your continued trust in our team.
all.zh: 感謝您考量本提案，並持續信任我們的團隊。

all.en: Creator selection prioritized authenticity, audience quality, and brand value fit.
all.zh: 創作者篩選優先考量真實性、受眾品質與品牌價值契合度。

all.en: Each creator profile includes audience demographics and prior brand collaborations.
all.zh: 每位創作者簡介皆包含受眾組成與過往品牌合作經歷。

all.en: Performance benchmarks are based on industry averages from the past twelve months.
all.zh: 績效基準依據過去十二個月的業界平均值設定。

all.en: Bonus payments will be unlocked when key milestone targets are exceeded.
all.zh: 達成關鍵里程碑目標時將解鎖獎金支付條件。

all.en: Whitelisting agreements allow us to boost top performing posts as paid media.
all.zh: 白名單授權協議允許我們將表現頂尖的貼文加碼投放為付費媒體。

all.en: Content calendars will be co created during a kickoff workshop in two weeks.
all.zh: 內容行事曆將於兩週後的啟動工作坊中共同制定。

all.en: Sample products will be sent in eco friendly packaging consistent with brand values.
all.zh: 樣品將以符合品牌價值的環保包裝寄送。

all.en: All briefs will be reviewed by both legal and brand teams before activation.
all.zh: 所有需求書於啟動前皆會經由法務與品牌團隊共同審查。

all.en: An end of campaign report will summarize learnings and recommendations clearly.
all.zh: 活動結束後將提交報告，清楚總結學習成果與建議事項。

all.en: We look forward to building a long term relationship with each chosen creator.
all.zh: 我們期待與每位入選的創作者建立長期合作關係。

all.en: Honestly, I tried one of our hero products last weekend before recommending it to influencers.
all.zh: 老實說，在向網紅推薦前，我自己上週末就先試用了我們的主打產品。

all.en: My skin felt noticeably calmer the morning after just one application.
all.zh: 只用了一次，隔天早上肌膚就明顯感覺平靜許多。

all.en: That kind of personal experience is exactly what we want creators to share authentically.
all.zh: 這種親身體驗，正是我們希望創作者能真實分享出來的感受。

all.en: My cousin who works in publishing said she trusts honest reviews more than glossy ads.
all.zh: 我表妹在出版業工作，她說比起精美的廣告，她更相信誠實的評價。

all.en: We should keep that in mind when reviewing every draft caption with our partners.
all.zh: 我們和合作夥伴一起審每則貼文文案時，都應該把這點放在心上。

all.en: Please remind the team that brand safety reviews go faster when feedback is grouped together.
all.zh: 也請提醒團隊，意見集中一起回覆會讓品牌安全審查跑得更快。

all.en: Last campaign, scattered comments cost us two extra business days on every revision round.
all.zh: 上一檔活動，零散的意見讓每一輪修改都多花了兩個工作天。

all.en: I would like to try sending creators a small handwritten note inside their sample boxes.
all.zh: 我想試著在寄給創作者的樣品盒裡放一張小小的手寫卡片。

all.en: Little touches like that often make people feel valued rather than just contracted.
all.zh: 這種小細節常常會讓人覺得被珍視，而不只是被合約綁住的對象。

all.en: Looking forward to hearing your thoughts before we finalize the kickoff agenda next Monday.
all.zh: 期待下週一敲定啟動會議議程前能聽到你的想法。
